name: Thorns and Burn Kill Credit
description: Restores kill credit, experience, and death-trigger events for Thorns kills, and attributes lethal Burning damage to the unit that applied it.

patches.description: Remove the Thorns-only result flag that suppresses killed/kill events and their kill-credit path.
Pack Poison, Open Wounds, and Burning state IDs into the lethal periodic-damage owner lookup table.
Read the packed state IDs as bytes and scan all three states when resolving the owner of a periodic-damage kill.
